options.name: --embed-css
options.description: Embed the CSS into the HTML file instead of using the <link> tag

options.name: --no-gfm
options.description: Use plain Markdown mode instead of GitHub Flavored Markdown (gfm)

options.name: --help
options.description: Show this help message and exit

errors.htmlExtension: File cannot have .html extension because it would be overwritten
errors.embedCss: Could not get css. Check your internet connection or try without --embed-css.
errors.markdownConversion: Could not convert markdown to HTML. Check your internet connection.
